nasb.text: Then David said to Achish, “If now I have found favor in your sight, let them give me a place in one of the cities in the country, that I may live there; for why should your servant live in the royal city with you?”

esv.text: Then David said to Achish, “If I have found favor in your eyes, let a place be given me in one of the country towns, that I may dwell there. For why should your servant dwell in the royal city with you?”

cnv.text: 大衛對亞吉說：“我若是在你眼前蒙恩，求你在這地的城市中，給我一個地方，讓我住在那裡。為甚麼要你的僕人與你一同住在王城呢？”

ccb.text: 大卫对亚吉说：“如果你开恩，就让我到郊野的一个城邑去住吧，何必让仆人与王一同住在都城呢？”
